home.hero_subtitle: A peaceful home next to Mežaparks — A+ class new residential building with terraces, balconies, and a covered parking.
home.about_title: A new A+ energy efficiency residential building in Rīga
home.about_body: AlmaHome is a modern, neighbourhood-scale building in a quiet part of Rīga, just minutes from Mežaparks and Lake Ķīšezers. Strong energy efficiency, natural materials, and considered floor plans for everyday living.
features: Terraces on the first floor, balconies above
home.location_title: Quiet and green, minutes from the city centre
home.location_body: Mežaparks, Lake Ķīšezers, and OZO Golf Club — walks and sports right at your doorstep. Vecāķi beach is ~15 minutes by car, Rīga centre ~15 minutes. Easy access to public transport and Brīvības gatve.
home.apartments_body: 24 apartments, 1–4 rooms, terraces or balconies. Find your floor plan and price.
home.contact_body: We respond promptly and help you find the right apartment.

par_namu.title: About — AlmaHome
par_namu.description: AlmaHome is an A+ energy efficiency class new residential building in Rīga: architecture, materials, finishes, and surroundings.
par_namu.hero_subtitle: AlmaHome is a neighbourhood-scale residential building — modern materials, quiet, and natural daylight.
par_namu.arch_title: Calm design that fits its surroundings
par_namu.arch_body_1: A three-storey building with a contemporary façade rhythm and a low silhouette. Tall vertical openings and deep window reveals create a confident yet warm character. The first floor opens onto private terraces; the upper floors have balconies.
par_namu.arch_body_2: The inner courtyard is shielded from street noise — a green area with benches and a children's playground, a place to meet your neighbours.
par_namu.materials_body: We work with European manufacturers and pick materials that look and live well for years. The base specification includes everything shown in the images.

materials_cards.title: Italian tiles
materials_cards.subtitle: ITALGRANITI
materials_cards.desc: Porcelain tiles — wall and floor with the Travertino Beige Vein effect. The natural look of stone with everyday durability.

materials_cards.title: Sanitaryware
materials_cards.subtitle: IDEAL STANDARD
materials_cards.desc: Solid-surface stone baths and shower trays — refined design, high quality, and a pleasant user experience.

materials_cards.title: Kitchen cabinetry
materials_cards.subtitle: by the Austrian manufacturer EGGER
materials_cards.desc: Quality materials, precise manufacturing, and modern design — functionality and comfort in your kitchen.

materials_cards.title: Doors
materials_cards.desc: Concealed frames, tall doors with hidden hinges, and quality cores — visually raise ceiling height and dampen noise.

par_namu.energy_title: A+ class — warmer home, lower bill
par_namu.energy_body: Highly insulated walls and roof, triple glazing, mechanical ventilation with heat recovery, and heat-pump heating. The building meets A+ — one of the highest standards in Latvia.
energy_features: 150 mm of stone wool insulation in the façade
Heat recovery ventilation in every apartment
par_namu.surroundings_title: Quiet area, everything you need close by
par_namu.surroundings_body_1: Mežaparks and Lake Ķīšezers are five minutes away, OZO Golf Club is right next door. Grocery stores, pharmacies, kindergartens, and schools are within walking distance. Public transport to the centre runs regularly.
par_namu.surroundings_body_2: Brīvības gatve and Vairoga iela provide quick access to both the city centre (~15 min) and Vecāķi beach (~15 min by car).
par_namu.cta_title: Ready to view your next home?
par_namu.cta_body: 24 apartments with terraces and balconies. Find the right floor plan and price.

par_projektu.title: The project — AlmaHome
par_projektu.description: AlmaHome project: 24 apartments across 3 floors at Mores iela 15, Rīga. A+ class, terraces and balconies. Detailed overview of the area and location.
par_projektu.hero_subtitle: A new residential complex in a quiet part of Rīga, close to Mežaparks.
par_projektu.overview_title: Considered floor plans for every level
par_projektu.overview_body_1: 24 apartments across three floors: the ground floor has eight apartments with private terraces and direct access to the inner courtyard; the second and third floors each have eight apartments with balconies and sunny views over the garden.
par_projektu.overview_body_2: The plans are designed so that one-room and four-room apartments coexist organically in the same building — without compromise on privacy or daylight.
par_projektu.map_body: The quiet Mežaparks district — 15 minutes by car to the centre, with nature and sports right at your doorstep.
par_projektu.cta_body: Book a private site visit — we'll help you find the right floor plan.

apdares.title: Finishes specification — AlmaHome
apdares.description: Detailed AlmaHome finishes and materials specification for apartments and shared spaces: walls, floors, stairwells, and all construction materials.
apdares.hero_body: The full list of materials and engineering solutions — from foundations to sanitaryware. The base specification included in the apartment price.
apdares.intro_body: The specification is binding and forms part of the purchase agreement. If you have questions about a specific item or want a custom configuration, please get in touch.
apdares.cta_body: Send a request — we'll answer questions on materials, custom configurations, and apartment viewings.
